channel.title: The Rest of the Record — HPD Class C Violations
channel.description: The Rest of the Record feed: The Rest of the Record — HPD Class C Violations

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 715 EAST 32 STREET, Apt 3B, BROOKLYN
item.description:
Outcome: Open
HMC ADM CODE: § 27-2017.4 ABATE THE INFESTATION CONSISTING OF ROACHES IN THE ENTIRE APARTMENT LOCATED AT APT 3B, 3rd STORY, 4th APARTMENT FROM NORTH AT EAST

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 75 LENOX ROAD, Apt C6, BROOKLYN
item.description:
Outcome: Open
§ 27-2005 HMC: PROPERLY REPAIR OR REPLACE THE BROKEN OR DEFECTIVE SPRING BALANCE AT UPPER SASH, FIRE ESCAPE WINDOW IN THE 4th ROOM FROM EAST LOCATED AT APT C6, 3rd STORY, 2nd APARTMENT FROM EAST AT SOUTH , SECTION AT SOUTH

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 35 MONTGOMERY STREET, MANHATTAN
item.description:
Outcome: Open
§ 27-2005, 27-2007, 27-2041.1 HMC, §238, § 309; § 107 (2) ( C) MDL AND 28 RCNY §25-171: REPLACE OR REPAIR THE SELF-CLOSING DOORS THAT IS MISSING OR DEFECTIVE DOOR FRAME AT VESTIBULE , 1st STORY

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 1710 POPHAM AVENUE, Apt 1D, BRONX
item.description:
Outcome: Open
§ 27-2056.6 ADM CODE - CORRECT THE LEAD-BASED PAINT HAZARD - PAINT THAT TESTED POSITIVE FOR LEAD CONTENT AND THAT IS PEELING OR ON A DETERIORATED SUBSURFACE - USING WORK PRACTICES SET FORTH IN 28 RCNY §11-06(B)(2) EAST WALL, WEST WALL IN THE 2nd ROOM FROM EAST AT NORTH LOCATED AT APT 1D, 1st STORY, 1st APARTMENT FROM WEST AT NORTH

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 1001 EAST 167 STREET, Apt 2E, BRONX
item.description:
Outcome: Open
§ 27-2056.7 ADM CODE: CORRECT FAILURE TO PROVIDE TO THE DEPARTMENT WITHIN 45 DAYS OF DEMAND ALL RECORDS REQUIRED TO BE MAINTAINED BY OWNER PURSUANT TO LOCAL LAW 1 OF 2004 RELATED TO LEAD-BASED PAINT NOTICES, INSPECTIONS AND REMEDIATION/ABATEMENT ACTIVITIES.

item.description:

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 50 EAST 172 STREET, Apt W3, BRONX
item.description:
Outcome: Open
§ 27-2017.3 HMC: TRACE AND REPAIR THE SOURCE AND ABATE THE VISIBLE MOLD CONDITION... APPROX 5 SQFT AT CEILING, APPROX 6 SQFT AT WEST WALL, APPROX 3 SQFT AT NORTH WALL IN THE BATHROOM LOCATED AT APT W3, 1st APARTMENT FROM NORTH AT EAST ORIGINAL VIOLATION 16205983 ISSUED 04-SEP-23 HAS BEEN UPGRADED TO CLASS C PER ADMINISTRATIVE CODE 27-2017.3a(5)(a) or (b).

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 97 ELLWOOD STREET, Apt 4H, MANHATTAN
item.description:
Outcome: Open
§ 27-2017.3 HMC: TRACE AND REPAIR THE SOURCE AND ABATE THE VISIBLE MOLD CONDITION... GREATER THAN 10 SQUARE FEET AT CEILING AND EAST WALL IN THE BATHROOM LOCATED AT APT 4H, 4th STORY, 1st APARTMENT FROM SOUTH AT WEST , SECTION ''SOUTH'' ORIGINAL VIOLATION 17747492 ISSUED 08-MAR-25 HAS BEEN UPGRADED TO CLASS C PER ADMINISTRATIVE CODE 27-2017.3a(5)(a) or (b).

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 2420 DAVIDSON AVENUE, Apt 2B, BRONX
item.description:
Outcome: Open
§ 27-2017.3 HMC: TRACE AND REPAIR THE SOURCE AND ABATE THE VISIBLE MOLD CONDITION... AT N,EAST, SOUTH, AND WEST WALLS AND CEILING IN THE BATHROOM LOCATED AT APT 2B, 3rd STORY, 2nd APARTMENT FROM SOUTH AT WEST ORIGINAL VIOLATION 18311553 ISSUED 20-OCT-25 HAS BEEN UPGRADED TO CLASS C PER ADMINISTRATIVE CODE 27-2017.3a(5)(a) or (b).

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 2850 CRESTON AVENUE, Apt 5E, BRONX
item.description:
Outcome: Open
§ 27-2017.3 HMC: TRACE AND REPAIR THE SOURCE AND ABATE THE VISIBLE MOLD CONDITION... GREATER THAN 10 SQ.FT. AT CEILING AND EAST WALL AND AROUND WINDOW CASING IN THE BATHROOM LOCATED AT APT 5E, 6th STORY, 2nd APARTMENT FROM WEST AT NORTH ORIGINAL VIOLATION 18654513 ISSUED 18-FEB-26 HAS BEEN UPGRADED TO CLASS C PER ADMINISTRATIVE CODE 27-2017.3a(5)(a) or (b).

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 105 ELLIOT PLACE, Apt 2A, BRONX
item.description:
Outcome: Open
§ 27-2017.3 HMC: TRACE AND REPAIR THE SOURCE AND ABATE THE VISIBLE MOLD CONDITION... GREATER THAN 10 SQ. FT. AT EAST WALL WINDOW FRAME, AND EAST WALL IN THE 4th ROOM FROM NORTH LOCATED AT APT 2A, 4th STORY, 1st APARTMENT FROM EAST AT SOUTH ORIGINAL VIOLATION 18745523 ISSUED 29-MAR-26 HAS BEEN UPGRADED TO CLASS C PER ADMINISTRATIVE CODE 27-2017.3a(5)(a) or (b).
